steps.title: Identify the plural antecedent
steps.content: The blank pronoun must refer to the eating utensils, which is plural. The pronoun appears in the clause "he considered ______ dangerous and unnecessary luxury items."

steps.title: Match the pronoun to the antecedent's number
steps.content:
Identify the grammar issue: pronoun-antecedent agreement. Rule: a pronoun must match its antecedent in number.
  • Choice A — "them": plural object pronoun; agrees with plural antecedent "the eating utensils." ✓
  • Choice B — "this": singular demonstrative pronoun; disagrees with plural antecedent. ✗
  • Choice C — "that": singular demonstrative pronoun; disagrees with plural antecedent. ✗
  • Choice D — "it": singular pronoun; disagrees with plural antecedent. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
